title: Custom Feather Flags & Feather Banners | Banners.com
metaDescription: Stand out in a crowd and gain extra exposure with a high quality custom feather flag. We offer several different sizes to choose from and unlimited customization options.

FlagsBanner Magnets 4 Pack HomeCustom FlagsFeather Flags Feather Flags - Order Custom Feather Flags Online! Order High Quality Feather Flags Today Boost your visibility and draw attention with custom feather flags, the ultimate tool for creating eye-catching displays. Whether you're enhancing the curb appeal of your storefront, hosting a grand opening, or adding height and impact to your trade show booth, feather flags deliver unmatched versatility and style. These personalized feather flags are designed to stand out in any environment, helping you gain extra exposure and attract your audience's attention. With high-quality materials and vibrant printing, feather flags for businesses and events are a proven way to make a lasting impression and elevate your branding efforts. Please note the actual finished flag size is smaller. The sizes listed include the printed flag and the base. Choose an option below to get started on your order: 13 Foot Feather Flag View Product 17 Foot Feather Flag View Product 7 Foot Feather Flag View Product 9 Foot Feather Flag View Product More About Custom Feather Flags Return to Top Feather Flags are great for anyone looking for a stylistic yet informative display for their store, graduation party, or school event. Also known as razor flags, these flags are good for displaying a decent sized image with a small amount of text. These flags are easily assembled with a flag pole and display base that allows them to be displayed in either an indoor or outdoor setting. Download Feather Flag Templates to Create Your Design If you would like to design your own flags, you can download the templates below and then upload your files. We will check the artwork and send you a proof to verify that everything looks ok before we send the order into production. Feather (Razor) Flag Size Single Sided Template Double Sided Template 7 Foot Feather Flags 17.25"W x 61.75"H 17.25"W x 61.75"H 9 Foot Feather Flags 26.5"W x 78.1"H 26.5"W x 78.1"H 13 Foot Feather Flags 29.5"W x 124"H 29.5"W x 124"H 17 Foot Feather Flags 33.5"W x 173.5"H 33.5"W x 173.5"H All flags are printed using a direct dye-sublimation printing process. This means that the ink goes through the fabric rather than sitting on top of it. This creates an eye-popping display. The flags poles are constructed of a strong but flexible Carbon Composite material that is superior to other poles that have an aluminum base. Frequently Asked Questions Return to Top What are feather flags (razor flags)? Feather flags (also called razor flags) are tall, curved promotional flags designed for high visibility in a small footprint. They’re popular for storefronts, events, and roadside advertising. What sizes do feather flags come in? Feather flags are available in 7 ft, 9 ft, 13 ft, and 17 ft sizes. Are feather flags single-sided or double-sided? Choose single-sided (single-reverse) or double-sided printing. Single-reverse shows a mirrored image on the back, while double-sided is readable on both sides and is best for text-heavy designs. What materials are feather flags made of (and what are the poles made of)? Feather flags are made from polyester–nylon fabric printed with dye sublimation for vibrant color. Poles are flexible carbon composite for strength and wind performance. Do feather flags have a matte or glossy finish? Feather flags have a matte finish to help reduce glare outdoors. Do feather flags come with hardware or bases? Feather flags require a pole-and-base setup, and you can choose indoor or outdoor base options at checkout depending on where you’ll display the flag. What is the production time for feather flags, and when does turnaround start? Production options typically range from 2–5 business days depending on what you select at checkout. Turnaround starts after file upload is complete, or after proof approval if a proof is requested or prepress flags the order. How long do feather flags last outdoors? With continuous outdoor use, typical lifespan is 3–6 months, and taking the flag down during severe weather can help extend it. Do you offer a warranty on feather flags? Yes—feather flags include a prorated monthly warranty with proper installation and use. For example, if a flag fails after 2 months, we cover 33% of the replacement cost. Can I wash my feather flag, and will the sun fade it? Yes—wash on a gentle cycle with cold water, avoid bleach, and air-dry. Over time, any flag can fade with prolonged sun exposure, but dye-sublimation printing helps color last longer because the ink is absorbed into the fabric. Why Choose Banners.com? Customer Service Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers. Fast Turnaround Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule. Quality Products Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.
